---
title: "Program"
filename: program
toc: true
listing:
  - id: workshops-list
    contents: "workshops/*.qmd"
    type: default
    date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
    sort: "title"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-description-length: 150
    fields: [date, author, title, length, description]
    field-display-names:
      date: "Time"
      author: "Lead"
      length: "Length"
  - id: showcases-list
    contents: "showcases/*.qmd"
    type: default
    date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
    sort: "title"
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    max-description-length: 150
    fields: [date, author, title, description]
    field-display-names:
      date: "Time"
      author: "Presenters"
---

### Program {.hide}

Each day's programs will run from 12:00-5:00 ET  
*The current schedule is tentative and subject to change.*

Date | Program
---- | --------------------
**Monday October 5** | • Workshops<br>• AGM
**Tuesday October 6** | • Student Presentations (including 3 minute thesis, 3MT) 
**Wednesday October 7** | • ECR Award Plenary<br>• Cross Country Research Showcase (Symposiums)<br>• Award Ceremony
: {tbl-colwidths="[25,75]"}

## Workshops {#workshops .no-border}

[*View all*](program_workshops.qmd)  

:::{#workshops-list}
:::

## Cross Country Research Showcases {#showcases .no-border}

[*View all*](program_showcases.qmd)  

:::{#showcases-list}
:::
